title: taraxacum glaucanthum
intro: Taraxacum glaucanthum, also known as the smooth-leaved dandelion or Russian dandelion, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include its diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum glaucanthum include its ability to support liver health, reduce blood pressure, and aid in digestion, making it a valuable herb for promoting overall well-being. Taraxacum glaucanthum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for its medicinal properties, and is often used in herbal remedies to support liver and digestive health.
